description: Style Note  We like Indian apparel from biba. Bright and colourful with traditional details and easy to pair, their kurtas are favourites for those who like an ethnic look. Product Details  White sleeveless kurta, has a round neckline, crochet detail around the neckline, embroidered floral patterns in front, two pockets on the side and lace detailing at the hemline    Material and Care  100% cotton  Wash separately in cold water  Do not bleach  Dry in shade  Use medium to hot iron Size and Fit  Regular fit  The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size 32 White sleeveless kurta, has a round neckline, crochet detail around the neckline, embroidered floral patterns in front, two pockets on the side and lace detailing at the hemline
